body:
Summary

Unifies all user-facing strings in the backend to English and adds a language convention document.

Related to #51 (does NOT close — frontend text is out of scope for this PR).

## Changes

### Backend messages unified to English
- src/routes/auth.js — register, login, refresh, logout messages
- src/routes/users.js — 501 placeholder messages and JSDoc comments
- src/routes/matches.js — 501 placeholder messages and JSDoc comments
- src/routes/index.js — leaderboard JSDoc comments
- src/middleware/auth.js — token error messages and comments
- src/middleware/errorHandler.js — fallback error message and comments
- src/middleware/rateLimiter.js — rate limit message and comments
- src/middleware/validate.js — all withMessage() strings; also fixed misplaced import (moved to top); added changePasswordRules
- src/socket.js — inline comments

### Documentation
- CardGame/docs/language.md — new file defining the English-only convention with examples
- AGENTS.md — added language rule to Dev tips
title: chore: unify all backend user-facing text to English
